name: Ghost Seapark
description:
Hello. Welcome To Ghost Seapark.

There are the some rules to follow if you want to come visit our humble aquarium...

1.) LEAVE BEFORE NIGHTFALL.

2.) IF YOU HEAR THE ANIMALS TALKING TO YOU, DO NOT TRY TALKING BACK TO THEM.

3.) DO NOT LOOK AT THE STAFF DIRECTLY IN THE EYES.

4.) ALWAYS LOOK AT THE WATER BEFORE ENTERING ANY POOL.

[Update: New Friends scenario. This time, you are not alone in this place, you have brought some of your friends to keep you company in this place! Will you leave before nighttime or will you all stay in there?]
creator: StellarDimension_159
